description: Create a 'polite' crawling profile for a fragile client site. Configure the crawler with a maximum of 1 thread and a speed of 2.0 URLs/s, saving a screenshot of these settings to ~/Documents/SEO/reports/speed_settings.png. Set a custom User-Agent to 'AuditBot 1.0' and save a screenshot of this configuration to ~/Documents/SEO/reports/ua_settings.png. Save the complete configuration profile to ~/Documents/SEO/configs/polite_profile.seospiderconfig. Perform a test crawl of https://books.toscrape.com/ until at least 20 URLs are processed, then export the 'Internal HTML' data to ~/Documents/SEO/exports/polite_crawl_data.csv.
